hero.eyebrow: Yangjae Flagship · The Room Euljiro Dongdaemun
hero.h1:
The grace of Korea,
unintimidating high-end K-BBQ.
hero.sub:
Yukjeup Gwaliso is Seoul's premium K-BBQ dining experience, where Korean beauty is distilled into a single meal. We believe that dining can be an act of genuine hospitality — and so we bring together great food, thoughtful space, and the spirit of 'sŏmgim' (heartfelt service) into one.

Black pork from Sancheong and white pork from Geochang, raised on wild mugwort in the clean air of the Jirisan foothills. Patented wave-aging, 100% bamboo charcoal direct-fire grilling, seven signature sauces, and expert tableside grilling service. Every detail — from the space and plating to the flow of service — is crafted by a founder with a fashion design background.

A new Korean Dining Experience where traditional aesthetics meet contemporary sensibility.

Whether it's a company dinner, a date, or an evening with someone you cherish — dressed up, yet never stiff.

footer.disclaimer: Menu items and prices may vary by location.
footer.originLine: Sancheong Black Pork · Geochang White Pork · 100% Bamboo Charcoal
footer.copyright: © {year} Yukjeup Gwaliso · Menu and prices may vary by location

sancheon.body1: In the foothills of Mt. Jirisan's Cheonwangbong Peak — Sancheong, birthplace of Heo Jun's Dongui Bogam. The black pork raised here is unlike any other.
sancheon.body2: Sancheong black pork is a 'Korean-style Berkshire' — a native heritage breed crossed with British Berkshire. Raised longer than standard pigs, it develops denser, firmer meat with an exceptional balance of fat and lean.
sancheon.body3: The black pork we source is raised on wild mugwort. The antioxidants in mugwort eliminate off-flavors and create an umami that deepens with every bite.
sancheon.body4pre: That balance has been verified by expert palates. In a blind test by '정육왕' (Meat King), a specialist YouTube channel, Sancheong black pork was ranked
sancheon.body4post: among Korea's Top 5 Premium Pork breeds.
sancheon.body5: Combined with Yukjeup Gwaliso's patented wave-aging technology, the natural flavors of the meat are elevated to their fullest expression.
